9 
    Data {
10 
        // in data state, gather characters until a character reference or tag is found
11 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
12 6 1. read : RemoveSwitch 0 mutation → TIMED_OUT

                case '&':
14 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.advanceTransition(CharacterReferenceInData);
15 
                    break;
16 
                case '<':
17 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.advanceTransition(TagOpen);
18 
                    break;
19 
                case nullChar:
20 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → SURVIVED
 
                    t.error(this); // NOT replacement character (oddly?)
21 2 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/CharacterReader::consume → KILLED
2. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit(r.consume());
22

23

2. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Token$EOF::<init> → KILLED

25 
                    break;
26 
                default:
27 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/CharacterReader::consumeData → TIMED_OUT
 
                    String data = r.consumeData();
28 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit(data);
29 
                    break;
30 
            }
31 
        }
32
